variants: Zhihao Pei was born in Shadowcrest Hamlet, where he began cultivating his interests from a young age. He is now a resident of Newtleaf Hamlet, where he continues to pursue his creative aspirations. An accomplished author, Zhihao's renowned work, the Duskthread Expansion Index, has garnered him the prestigious Dreamscribe Plaque. In addition to his literary achievements, he is also an avid fencer, holding membership in the Ultramarine Fencers League. This blend of artistry and athleticism characterizes much of his life and work.
